section_name: Failure to Return Driver’s License or Vehicle Registration; Offense
text:
(a) A person commits an offense if the person wilfully fails to send a driver’s license or vehicle registration as required by Section 601.372 (Return of Driver’s License and Vehicle Registration to Department) . An offense under this subsection is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine not to exceed $200.

(b) The department may direct a department employee to obtain and send to the department the driver’s license and vehicle registration of a person who fails to send the person’s license or registration in accordance with Section 601.372 (Return of Driver’s License and Vehicle Registration to Department) . The director of the department or the person designated by the director may file a complaint against a person for an offense under Subsection (a).
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 601. Motor Vehicle Safety Responsibility Act
##### § 601.373 — Failure to Return Driver’s License or Vehicle Registration; Offense

(a) A person commits an offense if the person wilfully fails to send a driver’s license or vehicle registration as required by Section 601.372 (Return of Driver’s License and Vehicle Registration to Department) . An offense under this subsection is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine not to exceed $200.

(b) The department may direct a department employee to obtain and send to the department the driver’s license and vehicle registration of a person who fails to send the person’s license or registration in accordance with Section 601.372 (Return of Driver’s License and Vehicle Registration to Department) . The director of the department or the person designated by the director may file a complaint against a person for an offense under Subsection (a).

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995. Amended by Acts 1999, 76th Leg., ch. 884, Sec. 4, eff. Sept. 1, 1999.*
